english.headline: The Sportsman: Number 13's Day of Class
english.commentator: What a day of character from number 13! Before the first bounce, Fremantle City were short of players — so Alek pulled on the other jumper and gave them four minutes just so the game could go ahead. That's the spirit of footy right there. Then it was back to business for Hammond Park in an 80 to 26 win, and Alek went to work: a cracking tackle that won a free kick in front of goal, which he calmly slotted for a goal, and tackling all over the ground — nine for the match, including one on a boy twice his size and three times his weight, taken on without a flicker of fear. The coaches loved his awareness, always knowing where the ball was going. Class on and off the field, number 13 — that's how you play the game!
